assessorQuestions: ¿Cómo te llamas y cuántos años tienes?
¿Qué es lo que más te gusta de tu país desde el punto de vista turístico?
¿Qué idiomas hablas y cuál te resulta más difícil?
¿Cuál es tu objetivo profesional a largo plazo?
¿Por qué es importante la actitud en el sector hotelero?

data.walkIn: No reservation — requested room(s) not available. Suggest alternative: a standard room with garden view at €120/night

hotelInfo.label: Thermal baths
hotelInfo.detail: Open 09:00–21:00 daily, included in all room rates

hotelInfo.label: Spa treatments
hotelInfo.detail: Book at reception — minimum 24h in advance

checklist: Greet the guest warmly in Spanish
Ask for name / confirm or identify reservation
Confirm room type, nights, number of guests
For walk-ins: apologise, explain unavailability, offer alternative with price
Hand over room key, state room number
Wish them a pleasant stay (¡Que disfrute su estancia!)

data.complaintScenario: A guest approaches the front desk to complain that their room is too noisy — they can hear guests in the room above them walking and talking loudly. They have an early wake-up call at 06:00.
data.problemDetails: Guests in the room above are making loud noise. The guest paid for a quiet stay and cannot sleep.
resolutionOptions: Call the floor manager to speak to the guests in the room above
Offer to move the guest to a quieter room on a different floor (if available)
Offer complimentary earplugs or a do-not-disturb sign
Follow up with a phone call in 15 minutes to confirm the problem is resolved
checklist: Greet and listen to the guest calmly — let them explain
Apologise sincerely using formal usted register
Take action: call the relevant department or manager
Offer a concrete solution or compensation
Confirm the guest is satisfied before they leave
Thank them for bringing the issue to your attention
